history.text: Please no ice in my soda, it waters it down

history.text: Got it, we'll have Coca-Cola without ice—perfect for keeping your drink strong and not watered down. Anything else for you today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it—your Coca-Cola without ice is on its way. Thanks for your order!
